_comment: Mycelia MCP server config for any MCP host (Claude Desktop/Code, Cursor, Windsurf). Copy the 'mycelia' entry into your host's mcpServers. Requires: tsx (bundled dev dep) OR build to JS. Set MYCELIA_KEY to a bech32 suiprivkey to reuse a funded wallet, else a local key is generated at ~/.mycelia/keystore.json and must be funded (SUI + WAL on testnet).

env.MYCELIA_KEY: suiprivkey1... (optional: reuse a funded wallet; else auto-generated + must be funded)
